title: BetterRPG
description: Nicely stylized and optimized modpack for Minecraft, beautiful generation, interesting mechanics and RPG leveling.
body:
**The mod is aimed at enjoyable gameplay in single player and multiplayer! Explore the world, upgrade your skills and find interesting mechanics!**

Modpack includes vanilla tweaks mod, author: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanillatweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanillatweaks)
